hero.eyebrow: Reliable IT Support for Dental Practices Across Virginia
hero.headline: Future-Ready Systems. Human-Ready Support.
hero.subheadline: Managed IT, security, cloud, and clinical technology support tailored for dental practices—helping your office stay secure, compliant, and running smoothly every day.

items.title: Fully Managed IT
items.text: Proactive support for workstations, servers, networks, and day-to-day operations.

items.title: Security & Compliance by Design
items.text: HIPAA-aware security controls, endpoint protection, and secure access practices.

items.title: Dental Workflow Support
items.text: EMR/EHR, imaging, front desk, and operatory systems support.

items.title: Local & Responsive
items.text: Serving Richmond, Northern Virginia, and dental practices across Virginia.

whyUs.title: Why Dental Practices Choose Us
bullets: Minimized downtime and faster issue resolution
Secure systems designed for healthcare environments
Support that understands clinical and administrative workflows
philosophy: We combine next-gen design with dependable execution, treating your systems as mission-critical because they are.
Our promise is simple: partnership, transparency, and outstanding work—before, during, and after every project.

services.title: Services

groups.title: Fully Managed IT Services
items: Workstation, server, and device management across your practice
Proactive patching, monitoring, and routine maintenance
Backup oversight and recovery readiness planning
Responsive support with clear reporting and reviews

groups.title: Dental EMR & Clinical Systems Support
items: EMR and dental software support, optimization, and troubleshooting
Coordination for imaging, scanners, sensors, and connected devices
Secure provider and staff access across clinical systems
Vendor coordination for upgrades, issues, and system changes

groups.title: Microsoft 365 & Cloud Solutions
items: Microsoft 365 setup, licensing, and ongoing administration
Email security, mailbox support, and data protection guidance
Teams and SharePoint support for collaboration and file access
Cloud migration planning for modern, scalable operations

groups.title: Security & Cyber Protection
items: Endpoint protection, device encryption, and security hardening
Email security and phishing defense for office staff
Secure remote access for providers, staff, and approved vendors
Backup integrity checks and ransomware readiness planning

groups.title: Website, Hosting & Digital Presence
items: Custom website design aligned to your practice and brand
Mobile-friendly pages built for speed, usability, and trust
Secure hosting with backups, monitoring, and routine maintenance
Ongoing content updates and website support as your practice grows

groups.title: Networking, Wi‑Fi, Infrastructure, VoIP & Cameras
items: Secure wired and wireless network design for your office
Segmented Wi‑Fi for staff, clinical systems, and guest access
Firewall hardening, performance tuning, and network monitoring
VoIP and camera solutions planned for coverage and reliability

services.subtitle: Managed IT, security, cloud, networking, and web support for modern dental practices across Virginia.

pricing.title: Pricing & Service Plans
pricing.subtitle: Service plans are tailored to your practice's size, systems, and support priorities. Every quote is built around dependable coverage, security, and practical day-to-day support for dental offices across Virginia.

plans.name: Basic Care Plan
plans.monthly: Monthly pricing: custom quote by office size
plans.note: Custom quote based on office size, systems, and support needs.

plans.name: Premium Care + Extended Warranty
plans.monthly: Monthly pricing: custom quote by office size
plans.note: Most practices receive a tailored quote after a short consultation.

rows.basic: Small to mid-size offices needing reliable maintenance and support
rows.premium: Practices wanting broader protection, faster support, and predictable IT costs

whoWeServe.title: Who We Serve
whoWeServe.lead: We support dental practices of all sizes—from single-location offices to growing multi-site groups. Our services are tailored to the workflows, uptime needs, and security expectations of modern clinical and administrative environments.
challenges: Front-desk uptime is critical during office hours
Operatories depend on reliable workstations, imaging, and network performance
EMR/EHR and imaging systems must remain available and secure
Compliance and patient data protection are non-negotiable
approach: Support aligned with clinical and administrative workflows
Proactive maintenance with minimal disruption during office hours
After-hours maintenance and updates when needed
Clear communication with staff, vendors, and practice leadership
whoWeServe.serviceArea: Richmond, Northern Virginia, and statewide Virginia support
whoWeServe.subtitle: Dental Practices Across Virginia
whoWeServe.serviceAreaBody: Remote-friendly support with on-site capability when needed.

about.title: About
about.whoWeAre: NexGen Binary is a Virginia-based IT services company delivering secure, reliable, and people-first technology solutions for dental and healthcare practices. We partner with offices to strengthen operations, improve system performance, and provide responsive IT support built around real clinical and administrative workflows.
about.leadership: Our leadership brings over 20 years of IT experience across healthcare environments, with a strong foundation in secure systems, infrastructure, and operational support. Our team also brings experience serving dental practices, healthcare organizations, government agencies, and private-sector clients—combining enterprise-level discipline with local responsiveness.
about.licensedBody: We deliver with documentation, accountability, and clear communication from day one.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: We support dental practices across Virginia with secure, dependable IT services. Call, email, or send a message and we’ll follow up with the right next steps for your office.
